title: EMA full events calendar — all upcoming workshops & webinars
description: Official EMA events calendar — all upcoming stakeholder meetings, scientific workshops, webinars and public hearings on medicines regulation in the EU.

title: EMA/HMA stakeholder workshop — AI in the pharmaceutical sector (H2 2026)
description: Annual HMA-EMA AI stakeholder workshop — review of the AI reflection paper implementation, regulatory expectations for AI in dossiers, and alignment with the EU AI Act. Priority event for EU pharma regulatory professionals.

title: EMA workshop — adaptive pathways, digital endpoints & AI in clinical trials
description: EMA workshop on modernising clinical trial design — adaptive pathways, AI-derived digital endpoints, electronic patient-reported outcomes and wearable data in regulatory submissions.

title: EMA Innovation Office — open town hall on AI, digital & advanced therapies
description: EMA Innovation Office open session — emerging regulatory science questions on AI/ML in submissions, ATMPs, and complex model-informed drug development. Q&A with EMA scientific experts.

title: FDA CDRH events — AI/ML in medical devices and SaMD
description: Full CDRH events calendar — AI/ML in medical devices, SaMD regulatory pathways, digital health, de novo classification workshops and AI-enabled devices guidance sessions.

title: FDA public workshop — AI/ML in drug and device lifecycle management
description: FDA workshop on AI/ML applications in post-market surveillance, labelling updates and lifecycle management — covering the FDA AI Action Plan and forthcoming guidance on predetermined change control plans.

title: FDA CDER AI hub — all events, guidance & AI research resources
description: CDER's central AI hub — upcoming workshops, draft guidances on AI in drug development, CDER AI Task Force publications and regulatory pathways for AI-assisted submissions.

title: TOPRA annual symposium 2026 — AI in regulatory affairs, human medicines & IVDs
description: Europe's premier regulatory affairs conference — AI in dossier preparation, EU AI Act compliance for pharma, benefit-risk frameworks, MDR/IVDR updates. Early-bird until 30 June 2026. 3-day event, Utrecht.

title: RAPS Regulatory Convergence 2026 — AI, digital health & global regulatory science
description: Regulatory affairs professionals' premier annual conference — AI tools in regulatory submissions, FDA/EMA convergence, AI Act compliance, real-world evidence and pharmacovigilance modernisation. 2,000+ attendees.

title: DIA Europe 2026 — AI, data science & regulatory innovation
description: DIA Europe's flagship meeting — dedicated AI in drug development track, EHDS implementation, digital health regulation, data standards (IDMP/FHIR) and real-world evidence frameworks. Key European regulatory event.

title: TOPRA webinar — augmenting regulatory intelligence with AI & LLMs
description: Webinar on leveraging AI and large language models to augment regulatory intelligence — submission review, label analysis, signal detection and competitive regulatory intelligence.

title: TOPRA full training catalogue — regulatory science, AI in submissions & pharmacovigilance
description: Full TOPRA training catalogue — regulatory affairs, clinical evaluation, benefit-risk, data standards, AI in dossiers, and EU regulatory updates for 2026.

title: RAPS events calendar — webinars, courses & regulatory convergence
description: RAPS full events calendar — regulatory webinars, online courses, regional workshops and the annual RAPS Regulatory Convergence. AI in regulatory science is a core 2026 theme.

title: Official EHDS webinar series — primary use, secondary use, governance & implementation
description: EC's ongoing EHDS webinar series: (1) primary use & EHR systems, (2) secondary use for research/regulatory purposes, (3) implementation governance. Essential for EU pharma data professionals.

title: DARWIN EU annual forum 2026 — real-world data network & federated analytics
description: DARWIN EU's annual stakeholder forum — EMA's real-world data network for pharmacoepidemiological studies. Results from federated analyses, data quality standards, OMOP harmonisation and regulatory acceptance of network study outputs.

title: HL7 FHIR DevDays 2026 — FHIR standards, SMART on FHIR & health interoperability
description: The premier FHIR technical conference — FHIR R5, SMART on FHIR, FHIR for clinical trials, regulatory submissions in FHIR format and EHDS FHIR implementation profiling. Essential for health data standards professionals.

title: OHDSI Global Symposium 2026 — OMOP CDM, real-world evidence & network studies
description: Observational Health Data Sciences and Informatics symposium — OMOP CDM updates, federated network analyses, AI on real-world data, pharmacoepidemiology and regulatory acceptance of OHDSI studies by EMA/FDA.

title: EHDS professional training — pharma, healthcare & digital health providers
description: Tailored EHDS training — GDPR/EHDS alignment, secondary use frameworks, data access rules, FAIR data principles and cross-border health data governance for EU pharma organisations.

title: ISMB/ECCB 2026 — AI in computational biology, protein structure & genomics
description: World's leading computational biology conference — AlphaFold successors, protein design, multi-omics AI, single-cell foundation models, ADMET prediction and clinical bioinformatics. Key venue for academic drug discovery AI.

title: ICML 2026 workshop — machine learning for drug discovery (MLDD)
description: Co-located with ICML — the premier machine learning workshop for drug discovery: generative molecular design, graph neural networks for molecular properties, AI-guided synthesis and multi-target drug design.

title: IEEE EMBC 2026 — AI in biomedical engineering & clinical systems
description: IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Conference — AI for signal processing, medical imaging, neural engineering, drug delivery systems, biosensors and digital biomarkers. Bridge between AI research and clinical application.

title: Drug Discovery Chemistry 2026 — AI-enabled lead optimisation & ADMET
org: Cambridge Healthtech Institute · San Diego (5–7 Oct)
description: Industry-focused conference on AI for medicinal chemistry — generative AI for scaffold design, ML-ADMET predictions, structure-based drug design with AI, multiparameter optimisation and AI-accelerated synthesis planning.

title: CPHI Worldwide 2026 — AI in pharma manufacturing, supply chain & digitalisation
description: Pharma industry's largest global event — dedicated digital & AI track covering AI-driven process optimisation, predictive quality, digital twins for manufacturing, supply chain AI and AI in CMC regulatory submissions. 45,000+ attendees.

title: AI drug discovery & development summit 2026
description: Dedicated summit for the full AI drug development pipeline — target identification, generative chemistry, AI-assisted clinical development, regulatory strategy and AI governance for biopharma.

title: National Academies — advancing drug discovery with AI webinar series
description: Ongoing National Academies series — AI-enabled target identification, translational research, clinical translation and regulatory science for AI-designed therapeutics.

title: AIChE PD2M — AI for pharmaceutical manufacturing & formulation
description: AI for pharmaceutical process development and manufacturing — ML for process control, formulation optimisation, continuous manufacturing AI and quality-by-design with machine learning.

title: MICCAI 2026 — medical image computing & AI in radiology/pathology
description: The world's leading medical imaging AI conference — AI diagnostics in radiology, pathology AI, surgical AI, MRI reconstruction, CT interpretation, multimodal clinical models and FDA/CE-cleared AI device studies. ~3,000 papers accepted.

title: ESMO Congress 2026 — AI in oncology, biomarkers & precision medicine
description: Europe's leading oncology congress with growing AI programme — AI-based tumour profiling, digital pathology for treatment selection, AI in clinical trial design and real-world outcomes for immuno-oncology agents.

title: ESMO Immuno-Oncology & Advanced Therapies Congress 2026 — AI in immunotherapy
description: ESMO's dedicated immuno-oncology and advanced therapy congress — AI biomarker discovery for immunotherapy response, digital pathology for tumour microenvironment analysis, AI in CAR-T cell therapy development.

title: AMIA Annual Symposium 2026 — clinical informatics, NLP & EHR AI
description: American Medical Informatics Association annual symposium — LLMs in clinical NLP, AI for EHR phenotyping, AI clinical decision support validation, pharmacovigilance NLP, FHIR APIs for AI and real-world evidence generation from EHR data.

title: ISPOR Europe 2026 — health economics, RWE & AI in HTA
description: Premier health economics and outcomes research conference — AI for real-world evidence generation, ML in comparative effectiveness research, AI-assisted HTA submissions, EHDS data for pharmacoeconomics and value-based care AI.

title: Pharmacovigilance World 2026 — AI in drug safety, signal detection & RWE
description: AI-driven pharmacovigilance — LLM-based adverse event case processing, predictive safety signal detection, NLP for MedDRA coding, real-world data integration for PSUR and PBRER preparation.

title: HIMSS Europe 2026 — digital health, AI & health IT for European healthcare
description: Europe's leading digital health conference — AI integration in hospital systems, EHDS compliance for healthcare providers, interoperability (FHIR/IHE), clinical AI governance and AI in population health management.

title: ACRP Annual Meeting 2026 — AI in clinical research & decentralised trials
description: Association of Clinical Research Professionals annual meeting — AI in site selection, patient recruitment AI, adaptive trial design with machine learning, synthetic control arms and AI for decentralised clinical trials.

title: KDD 2026 — Knowledge Discovery & Data Mining, health & biomedical AI track
description: ACM's flagship data science and AI conference — applied data science track with clinical and biomedical AI, ML for drug discovery, federated learning for healthcare, large-scale health data analysis and causal ML for real-world evidence.

title: ICML 2026 — International Conference on Machine Learning
description: The premier machine learning research conference — foundation models, transformers, LLM alignment, AI safety, reinforcement learning, and specialised workshops on drug discovery ML, biomedical AI and AI regulation. 10,000+ attendees.

title: ACL 2026 — Annual Conference on Language Models & NLP
description: Association for Computational Linguistics annual conference — LLM capabilities and limits, biomedical NLP, clinical text mining, regulatory document NLP, hallucination mitigation and multilingual AI for EU pharma contexts.

title: ECAI 2026 — European Conference on Artificial Intelligence
description: Europe's leading AI research conference — AI ethics and governance, explainable AI for healthcare, EU AI Act technical compliance, AI in scientific discovery and responsible AI deployment frameworks. Key European AI research venue.

title: NeurIPS 2026 — Neural Information Processing Systems
description: The world's largest AI research conference — frontier LLMs, AI safety/alignment, foundation models for science, AI in drug discovery workshops, ML for healthcare, and the ML4H symposium. Required reading: any paper on biomedical AI agents or protein LLMs.

title: AI Safety Summit 2026 — frontier model governance & international standards
org: UK / France / G7 · TBC (follow-up to Bletchley/Seoul/Paris)
description: International AI safety summit — frontier model risk assessment, AI incident reporting, international standards alignment (ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF), AI Act global convergence and sector-specific AI safety frameworks including healthcare.

title: ENISA AI Act implementation events — cybersecurity & AI risk management for pharma
description: ENISA events on EU AI Act technical implementation — high-risk AI system requirements, conformity assessment, AI security standards and ENISA guidelines for AI in healthcare and critical infrastructure.

title: OECD AI Observatory — health AI policy, governance & international frameworks
description: OECD's central hub for AI in health — scaling responsible AI in health systems, governance frameworks, health data policy and the OECD AI Principles in healthcare contexts.

title: IntuitionLabs — full directory of life sciences AI conferences 2026
description: Comprehensive searchable directory of 189+ life sciences AI events in 2026 — by topic (generative AI, LLMs, data governance, regulatory) and format (virtual, in-person, hybrid).

title: Bio-Europe 2026 — AI in biotech partnering, precision medicine & drug development
description: Europe's premier biotech partnering conference — AI-driven drug discovery partnerships, platform technology licensing, AI-enabled target validation, digital biomarker development and biopharma AI company showcases. 4,000+ partnering meetings.
